title: About
text: This is where your bio will go.

title: Brady Rippon
text: I am a biostatistician and software engineer with interests in clinical analysis tools, statistical programming, and data visualization. I am an enthusiastic R and SAS user and love thinking of ways to make research more transparent and approachable.
